description_long: This object is a compact semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish, featuring a short barrel and a squared-off slide. The grip is ergonomically shaped, slightly angled, and appears to be made of a polymer material, providing a comfortable hold. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, enclosing a curved trigger, and the magazine is shown separately, indicating it is detachable. The slide has minimal visible markings, with a smooth surface and a small ejection port on one side. The overall design is streamlined, with no external hammer and a low-profile sight system. The magazine base is flat and unadorned, matching the utilitarian aesthetic of the firearm.
description: A compact, matte black semi-automatic handgun with an ergonomic polymer grip, rounded trigger guard, and a detachable flat-based magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the handgun, including the grip, trigger guard, and a separate magazine.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slide's width and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip contour, trigger guard, and the magazine positioned separately.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle, barrel opening, and the front sight post.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured for ergonomic comfort, with a smooth, matte polymer surface that appears slightly textured for improved handling. It is gently curved to fit the palm, with a subtle flare at the base for stability. There are no visible finger grooves, logos, or embellishments, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, untextured surface with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any integrated accessories or reinforcement features.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and standard in profile, with no visible threading, porting, or compensator. It is flush with the slide and has a matte black finish, with no external markings or fluting.
attribute_slide_markings: There are minimal visible markings on the slide; no manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers are apparent. The slide surface is smooth and unadorned, contributing to the firearm's understated look.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular, with no extensions, flares, or finger rests. It has a plain, untextured surface and matches the overall utilitarian design of the handgun.
